feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Gallo stories
entry.content: does anyone on here have any weird stories regarding Mr Vincent Gallo ? I used to know a chick back in 2018 who was regularly chatting with him on insta, she was like barely 18 and he would talk to her abou his sexual experiences (like being in orgies n shit) and offering to come visit her on a helicopter, pretty dope stuff desu has anyone interacted with him or had personal experiences worth mentioning?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Collectortards are now putting silica gel packets inside game cases to prevent d…
entry.content: Collectortards are now putting silica gel packets inside game cases to prevent disc rot.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Studio execs should learn the difference between famous and popular. Characters …
entry.content: Studio execs should learn the difference between famous and popular. Characters like Superman, Robin Hood, Peter Pan etc. are famous, but that doesn't make them popular. Everyone knows them but isn't exactly a fan clamoring to go consume them as a media, which is why their films are always a financial letdown when given a big budget, even with giga astroturfing like in Superman's case.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Surely you all know that the movie called They Live by John Carpenter was actual…
entry.content: Surely you all know that the movie called They Live by John Carpenter was actually based on a short story about Reptillian beings?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: What is the biggest GAME franchise
entry.content: I’m talking about a game franchise with minimal to no TV/Movie spin-offs. No game crossover crap. Minimal merchandise(No plushies, toys, board games, and trading cards). The franchise is just games in the series

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: How to be Safe from False rape accusations
entry.content: Is there a way to be foolproof from being accused of rape? I'm a creepy looking dude some random woman can accuse me of rape and people will believe it. I don't even go near women anymore, I try to avoid them as best I can. Covered all my phone's cameras so I don't get accused of Creepshots. When I have go near a woman, I raise my hands like I'm being arrested. I keep logs of my locations and witnesses. I also make sure I am not alone with a woman in a room.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: i never understood why people felt suicidal until today. didn't sleep all night …
entry.content: i never understood why people felt suicidal until today. didn't sleep all night and now there's a symphony of reverse beeps from the construction work nearby. they never pause for more than 10 seconds before one starts again. is going 30 feet backwards really dangerous enough to warrant a beeper audible from half a block away?
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3039
entry.content: >Nursing Handjob Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84213163/ >Scripts to check image metadata: re
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What if the main reason why vibe coded projects are laggy/messy was human rather…
entry.content: What if the main reason why vibe coded projects are laggy/messy was human rather than technological? Like, "Claude, add this shiny new feature" gives off so much more dopamine than "Claude, please audit this codebase for spaghetti code", "Claude, please address these issues" and "Claude, could you audit this code for regressions?" combined.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Magically Charged Albums
entry.content: So I’ve been exploring a bit more recently since getting a nice pair of new headphones. I’m coming to find I thoroughly enjoy music that has a clear occult/esoteric/hermetic influence to it. Rather it be sort of evil (i love sinister sounding things, trap and drill are guilty pleasures of mine) or higher vibrational such as picrel or certain types of classical or jazz. Some other good examples of albums that are clearly steeped in magic are Led Zeppelin IV, Crystal Castles (II), Exmilitary, and
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Post the Bush Likelihood of your TV Waifu
entry.content: Very high likelihood — probably 80-90% in-character for Daphne Moon. Daphne (Jane Leeves) is written as a no-nonsense, earthy, working-class Mancunian from a big, chaotic family in 1990s Britain. She's practical, not vain or high-maintenance, and the show leans into her "natural" vibe — frumpy cardigans, psychic quirks, blunt honesty, and zero pretense.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: 70mm is a massive meme
entry.content: saw the odyssey at one of those select special theaters projecting it on 70mm laser bullshit at my girlfriend’s insistence. Not only did it look indistinguishable from any other theater I’ve been to but it actually looked fucking worse because of the violent flashing during every scene involving a bright sky. Thought it was going to give me an electric soldier porygon seizure. Swear to god this is all a massive meme and Nolan and his audience can’t even tell the difference themselves and only pr
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >He waited for Vault Breaker to actually master Cryo >He didn't get Vidmaster in…
entry.content: >He waited for Vault Breaker to actually master Cryo >He didn't get Vidmaster in Season 1 >He didn't get Zonewarden in Season 1 >He didn't try the Hybrid weapon pre nerf >He didn't pre-unlock Sentinel Cryo skin You literally didn't beat the game. Just because you "killed" Compiler into a no player lobby it doesn't mean you achieved anything at all. Marathon is an hardcore PVP game with high stakes and high rewards. You cheated not only the game, but yourself. You didn't grow. You didn't improve.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Out of curiosity, how much heat do your devices put out in total?
entry.content: Can be a rough estimate. My laptop and game console put out ~100 watts total when both are in use. Yet my room becomes Venusian-like after just 5 minutes without the A/C running. I'm only 55 kilos, it's not a fatso thing.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Is the aprilia tuareg the closest thing to a perfect motorcycle that has even been created?
entry.content: Every youtube reviewer that has reviewed the tuareg has made a follow up video talking about how they decided to buy on for themselves as their own personal do everything daily driver. Its almost incomprehensible how good the thing is.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How would you build a credit stick style system irl?
entry.content: The most common traits of them are >Physical token >Anonymous like cash >Stable in value >Can be used in far apart locations >no login required Is cryptography advanced & assymetric enough for this kind of thing?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Extension to block lust provoking imagery on this website. Can this "AI" create …
entry.content: Extension to block lust provoking imagery on this website. Can this "AI" create one for me? I am fighting a crippling addiction every day of my life for the last 10 years. The main culprit is cumulative exposure through 4chan board catalogs. Or would it be better to simply disable all images in threads? But then what is the point of an image board...
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: To Ingrid #60
entry.content: Oh Ingrid, my darling, my puzzling sweet queen, The most wonderfully peculiar sight ever seen! Your shimmering blonde hair glows bright as the sun, A dazzling cascade when the morning’s begun. Yet your grating, high voice makes me wince at the sound, The most terribly annoying noise to be found! Your cute little lips make a charming display, Matching the weird, funky hat that you wear every day. And that strange blue dress, so bizarrely designed, Is the single most curious outfit I’ll find. Your
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: how use youtube, anon? me click youtube.com. me see recommend video, no like the…
entry.content: how use youtube, anon? me click youtube.com. me see recommend video, no like them. me click menu on left, several category open. me click category and read recommend video, me no like. I don't know what videos I like, since I don't use youtube. How do you discover content if the recommendations don't work? Most of my content is Toronto videos about punjabi hip hop dance video.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I tried Alpine, because I wanted something with low resource usage. It uses a wh…
entry.content: I tried Alpine, because I wanted something with low resource usage. It uses a whole 10 MB less RAM than Debian. TEN MEGABYTES. It doesn't boot faster. It uses less disk space. That's the only benefit I noticed. Are "minimalistic" distros a meme?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: If a majority of Congress had Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) installed that we…
entry.content: If a majority of Congress had Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) installed that were hacked via a backdoor to induce sadistic, violent, and fascistic behavior, the United States would plunge into an immediate constitutional and existential crisis. However, the plan would still trigger massive resistance from the rest of the government, the military, and the public, even if the BCIs in question were required to play the latest VR games. If you want to explore the real-world science or legalities be

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: IMAX
entry.content: This has to be the most unnecessary, expensive, over-the-top, useless piece of fucking shit technology on the face of earth. It's also a pain to work with and few theaters out there are equipped to reproduce this format, and nobody gives a flying fuck to watch it. All of this so you can see 2 inches above the characters heads.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Anyone of you gays have one of these? What do YOU think? Need a good "crossover"…
entry.content: Anyone of you gays have one of these? What do YOU think? Need a good "crossover" that can handle some light off-road and not be terrible for city/hwy driving. I live in Chile btw. Most of our roads are quite good but when you go to cool camping or hiking places, it's always 300-800KM of pristine asphalt, then 30-50km of bad rutted washboarded mountain roads. So it needs to be good at both. I'm looking at a 2.0L AWD model, they go for around $28k new.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I saw the newest advengers trailer and I thought it was a little silly for one, …
entry.content: I saw the newest advengers trailer and I thought it was a little silly for one, here we go again with the whole war theme, Thor gives a gian speech in the trailer like he's a coach for a highschool football squad. It's just so obvious when Marvel starts to do it, but wars aren't really fought that way. You don' really just stand in a giant huge group of people and run at the opposing side in a huge empty field. They'll never show how war is really fought, I learned all about this in the military
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PQ wallet v2
entry.content: PQ wallet v2 Offline, client side, Post Quantum resistant cryptographic wallet and tool for use with email, text, forums, untrusted transport. Use it on the go, with mobile device, or remotely. Self host it, post it when you need it, access it anywhere a browser is available. Now with a general symmetric tool for encrypting files or string with PQ resistant AES. ----start of signed text---- White paper: https://files.catbox.moe/oc710p.pdf Wallet Diagram: https://files.catbox.moe/udkqvt.pdf For c
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: AI is what modern people are afraid of. Therefore AI is the future of horror either directly or indirectly through movies like Backrooms.

entry.content: let's start with a good one. oh my my my
